prompt: In July 2, 1959 United States standards for grades of processed fruits, vegetables, and certain other products listed as dehydrated, consider the items in the "dried and dehydrated section" specifically marked as dehydrated along with any items in the Frozen/Chilled section that contain the whole name of the item, but not if they're marked Chilled. As of August 2023, what is the percentage (to the nearest percent) of those standards that have been superseded by a new version since the date given in the 1959 standards?
actual:
**86%**

Here is my analysis:

I found the exact document: **AMS-141 "United States Standards for Grades of Processed Fruits, Vegetables, and Certain Other Products (As of July 2, 1959)"**, archived on the Internet Archive (identifier: unitedstatesstan14unit_4).

**From the "Dried or Dehydrated (Low-moisture)" section, items specifically marked as "dehydrated":**

| # | Standard | 1959 Effective Date | Current Status |
|---|----------|-------------------|----------------|
| 1 | Apples, Dehydrated (Low-moisture) | Nov 29, 1955 | **Superseded** — 2nd issue effective July 31, 1977 |
| 2 | Grapefruit Juice (Dehydrated) | Mar 19, 1956 | **Superseded** — 3rd issue effective Sep 26, 2012 |
| 3 | Orange Juice (Dehydrated) | Jan 27, 1956 | **Superseded** — Combined into Orange Juice standard Jan 10, 1983 |

**From the "Frozen or Chilled" section, items containing the whole product name of the dehydrated items (excluding items marked "Chilled"):**

| # | Standard | 1959 Effective Date | Current Status |
|---|----------|-------------------|----------------|
| 4 | Apples (Frozen) | Oct 24, 1955 | **Not superseded** — Still effective May 17, 1954 |
| 5 | Grapefruit Juice, Concentrated (Frozen) | Dec 10, 1951 | **Superseded** — 3rd issue effective Sep 26, 2012 |
| 6 | Grapefruit Juice & Orange Juice, Concentrated, Blended (Frozen) | Nov 1, 1957 | **Superseded** — Effective Sep 21, 1968 |
| 7 | Orange Juice, Concentrated (Frozen) | Dec 1, 1955 | **Superseded** — Combined into Orange Juice standard Jan 10, 1983 |

("Orange Juice, Chilled" was excluded because it was marked "Chilled.")

**Result: 6 out of 7 standards superseded = 85.71% ≈ 86%**
